title: elaphoglossum coriaceum
intro: Elaphoglossum coriaceum, also known as the thick-leaved elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum coriaceum include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Elaphoglossum coriaceum is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions or decoctions, and it can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements.
